notes: All content is pre-authored and static. No runtime AI calls.
IDs are stable references for event flags and save data.
gating.requires arrays use AND logic unless noted.
crew stat checks use role_bonus + trait_modifier vs event difficulty (1-5 scale)
irremovable=true means Nexus has integrated the module; cannot be unslotted
_meta.description: All weapon definitions for Void Meridian. 8 weapons across 3 tiers.

weapons.name: Ballistic Repeater
weapons.flavor: RELIABLE. LOUD. DOES NOT CARE ABOUT YOUR SITUATION.
weapons.passive: No setup required. Fires every turn with no conditions.

station_action.effect: Deals 2 damage. If operated by a Soldier, gains +1 damage and applies [SUPPRESSED] to target — they lose 1 initiative next turn.

weapons.name: Scatter Cannon
weapons.flavor: WIDE PATTERN. FORGIVING AIM. TERRIBLE FOR SALVAGE.
weapons.passive: At short range, hits automatically (no accuracy check). At medium range, accuracy check required. Cannot fire at long range.

station_action.effect: Deals 3 damage. If enemy hull is below 50%, triggers a random critical hit against one enemy system with no accuracy check.

weapons.name: Pulse Lance
weapons.flavor: PRECISE. QUIET. LEAVES NOTHING YOU WANTED TO SALVAGE.
weapons.passive: Can fire at any range with no penalty. When operated by a Technician, reveals one random enemy system stat before targeting.

station_action.effect: Deals 2 damage to hull OR 3 damage directly to a named enemy system (player chooses). If operated by Technician, system targeting costs no action.

weapons.name: Mk.II Missile Rack
weapons.flavor: THREE SHOTS. MAKE THEM MEAN IT.
weapons.passive: Limited ammo (3 per combat). Cannot be restocked mid-combat. Restocks at trade posts for 40cr per missile. Each hit guarantees a critical hit roll regardless of enemy hull %.

station_action.effect: Deals 5 damage and rolls for a critical hit. On critical: player chooses which enemy system is targeted. Costs 1 ammo.

weapons.name: EMP Array
weapons.flavor: IT DOESN'T DESTROY THEM. IT JUST MAKES THEM WATCH.
weapons.passive: Has 2 special charges per combat (recharges 1 per turn at Engineering station). Special charges enable the EMP Burst action.

station_action.effect: Costs 1 special charge. Deals 1 damage. Disables a named enemy system for 2 turns. Cannot disable the same system twice in one combat. If operated by Technician, disables last 3 turns instead.

weapons.name: Vreth Honor-Cannon
weapons.flavor: VRETH INSCRIPTION ALONG THE BARREL. YOU CANNOT READ IT. IT PROBABLY MATTERS.
weapons.passive: Grants +1 initiative when equipped. Vreth Dominion ships will not target your weapons system in combat if this weapon is visible on scan — they consider targeting an honored weapon cowardly.

station_action.effect: Deals 4 damage. If enemy hull is above 75% (uninjured), deals 6 damage instead — the Vreth reward striking first. If operated by Soldier, also applies [INTIMIDATED] to enemy: they skip their next Flee attempt.

weapons.name: Void Tendril Emitter
weapons.flavor: THE NEXUS GREW THIS. YOU DID NOT INSTALL IT. YOU NOTICED IT ONE MORNING.
weapons.passive: Ignores shields entirely — all damage applies directly to hull. Earns +1 Resonance per combat in which it deals a killing blow. Remnant Collective ships react with fear when they scan it: their crew takes a morale penalty during boarding.

station_action.effect: Deals 3 damage, ignoring shields. If captain has Nexus Attunement ability, deals 4 damage and applies [RESONANCE SCAR] — the enemy ship's crew suffers a morale penalty for the rest of combat.

weapons.nexus_flavor: A new growth on the forward hull. Crew won't talk about when it appeared.

weapons.name: Memory Cannon
weapons.flavor: IT FIRES SOMETHING. YOU DO NOT HAVE A WORD FOR WHAT.
weapons.passive: Special charge recharges each time the captain dies and the run resets — carried forward as 1 charge at run start. Each combat kill with this weapon stores a ghost of that enemy's initiative value, added to your next combat's starting initiative pool.

station_action.effect: Costs 1 special charge. Deals 2 damage to all enemies simultaneously (AoE). Each enemy hit triggers a critical hit roll. If captain has died 10+ times across all runs, deals 3 AoE damage instead.

weapons.nexus_flavor: After the first shot, two crew independently report the same dream that night.
